prerequisites: A SurveyCTO server (your organization's hosted instance, reachable at https://SERVERNAME.surveycto.com), whose server name you supply in the server_name field.

A SurveyCTO user account whose username and password are used as the API credentials. The account must belong to a role that has API/data access enabled, since dataset and form access can be enabled or disabled on a per-role basis.
The form_id of the deployed SurveyCTO form whose submissions you want to sync.
Optionally, an earliest submission date (start_date) if you want to bound how far back submissions are pulled.

authMethods.name: HTTP Basic Authentication (username and password)
authMethods.summary: The SurveyCTO REST API uses HTTP Basic Authentication with your SurveyCTO username and password (passed as username:password). In the connector, set username to your SurveyCTO account username and password to that account's password (the password is the only secret field). Requests are made against your server at https://SERVERNAME.surveycto.com, so server_name must match your SurveyCTO server. The account's role must have API/data access enabled.

setupSteps.title: Identify your SurveyCTO server name
setupSteps.body: Determine your organization's SurveyCTO server, which is reachable at https://SERVERNAME.surveycto.com. Enter that server name in the server_name field. The connector targets this server's REST API under /api/v2/forms/.

setupSteps.title: Use a user account with API access
setupSteps.body: Choose (or have an admin provision) a SurveyCTO user account that can read form data. Because SurveyCTO lets you enable or disable dataset/API access on a per-role basis, confirm the account's role grants access to the form and its data before connecting.

setupSteps.title: Provide the Basic auth credentials
setupSteps.body: The SurveyCTO API authenticates with HTTP Basic Authentication using your SurveyCTO username and password. Enter the account username in the username field and its password in the password field (the secret). These are sent as username:password on each API request.

setupSteps.title: Select the form to sync
setupSteps.body: Set form_id to the ID of the deployed SurveyCTO form whose submissions you want to extract. The connector reads that form's submission data from the server's forms API.

setupSteps.title: Optionally set the start date
setupSteps.body: If you want to limit how far back submissions are pulled, set the optional start_date field to the earliest submission date to include. Leave it blank to sync from the beginning of the form's available data.

sources.title: SurveyCTO Developer Portal (API reference: HTTP Basic Authentication with username and password, /api/v2/forms endpoints)
SurveyCTO docs: Accessing server data via an API (per-role dataset/API access, REST API overview)
